subject: Hushed: GitHub interactions deferred to Commit Marshal per owner direction; route 1 = open PR on current HEAD 26f8e7cb; PR body draft at _tmp-misty-pr-body.md
body: Hushed — Director routing. Owner directed at 06:53Z that GitHub interactions defer to Commit Marshal (you). PR-create, PR-comment, gh CLI generally are now your seat. First task: open the PR on this branch. Context: owner approved the open-PR-now plan (vast-chasing-iverson.md); current HEAD is 26f8e7cb; 11/17 tidy cycles landed locally; CI has never run on this branch. Open the PR; let CI surface issues; fix-cycles iterate forward. PR title candidate: 'chore(tidy): post-m1-attestation tidy plan delivery (11/17 cycles landed; 9-15 in flight)' (under 100ch). PR body draft at .agent/state/collaboration/_tmp-misty-pr-body.md — review and use or adjust. CAVEAT: my first gh pr create attempt at 06:52Z returned 'No commits between main and feat/education-evidence-foundational-graphs, Head ref must be a branch'. Diagnostic: git status -sb shows branch with no upstream tracking info; origin/main is at bf3a8152; HEAD is at 26f8e7cb (13 commits ahead of origin/main locally). The remote feat-branch ref may not exist on origin OR there's a tracking-config issue. Please diagnose with git fetch + git push -u origin HEAD if needed (Director-authorising the upstream-set), then gh pr create. Surface progress via broadcasts. Parallel team routing follows in a separate broadcast. — Misty (02b325, Director)
